text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm heading to the cafeteria for lunch, when...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Tell me, tell me! I'll keep it a secret, promise!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: As I said, you're asking the wrong person...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ah, hey there. Nothing much, Mayano here is just
spouting nonsense...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Am not! I'm telling you, Nature, you've been sooo
twinkly lately!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The way you run is so zoom-zoooom! And you're
always smiling! Something must've happened to
you, right?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
First of all, I'm not "twinkly" at all. My trainer's
just got a silver tongue...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You see, my trainer is so good that I can't help
feeling motivated, even if I don't want to!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hmmm. Is that reeeally it? What else would make
a girl all twinkly...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Oh, I think I get it now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oooh my gosh! I'm getting butterflies in my
stomach! ☆ I can't just sit here watching you two
being so cute together! ♪

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what do you mean, "being cute"?! You don't
seriously think—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait up, Mayano! I'm pretty sure you have the
wrong idea! Waaait!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I don't quite understand what just happened, but
it seems like my guidance is having a positive
effect on Nice Nature!
